title: BEM-642 dispatch token fix
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
wfs=Path('.github/workflows')
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

changed=[]
for wf in [wfs/'codex-runner.yml', wfs/'workflow-dispatch-queue-runner.yml']:
    if not wf.exists():
        continue
    text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
    new=text.replace('GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}','GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}')
    if 'permissions:' in new and 'actions: write' not in new:
        lines=new.splitlines()
        out=[]
        inserted=False
        for i,line in enumerate(lines):
            out.append(line)
            if line.strip()=='permissions:':
                out.append('  actions: write')
                inserted=True
        new='\n'.join(out)+'\n'
    elif 'permissions:' not in new:
        new=new.replace('on:\n', 'on:\n', 1)
        # leave as-is if no permissions section; do not risk malformed insert
    if new!=text:
        wf.write_text(new)
        changed.append(str(wf))

protocol=protocols/'WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_TOKEN_PERMISSIONS.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-642 | Workflow Dispatch Token Permissions'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:54 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Workflow dispatch helpers must use `github.token` fallback, not `secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN`. Workflows that dispatch workflows require `actions: write` permission.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'dispatch_token_permissions_fix.v1','bem':'BEM-642','status':'completed','changed':changed,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:54 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem642_fix_dispatch_token_permissions.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem642_fix_dispatch_token_permissions.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-642 | Fix Dispatch Token Permissions | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:54 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Changed workflows:'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x for x in changed])+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem642_fix_dispatch_token_permissions','cycle_id':'bem642-fix-dispatch-token-permissions','source':'gpt_executor','status':'completed','changed':changed,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:54 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem642_fix_dispatch_token_permissions']={'status':'completed','changed':changed,'blocker':None}
contour_state['workflow_dispatch_token_permissions']='fixed'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:54 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem642_fix_dispatch_token_permissions.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-642 PASS: workflow dispatch token context and actions permission fixed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)]+changed)
ops_applied.append('Fixed workflow dispatch token fallback and actions write permission in codex-runner and dispatch queue runner')
"""
No issue comments.
